summary: The user sought assistance with customizing the right-click button functionality in AutoCAD LT 2013, specifically to set the "Zoom Window" command as the default option. The session involved troubleshooting various steps to access the customization features, addressing the absence of certain options in the user interface, and providing alternative methods to achieve the desired functionality.
facts: The user is working with AutoCAD LT 2013. The user attempted to customize the right-click button to perform the zoom window function. The user could not find the right mouse button option in the Mouse Buttons section of AutoCAD LT 2013. The user reported that the "RButton" option was missing in the main CUI window. The user was guided through multiple steps to customize the right-click functionality, including accessing the Options dialog box and the User Preferences tab. The user expressed confusion regarding the absence of certain customization features in AutoCAD LT 2013. The user was advised to set "Zoom Window" as the default option in the shortcut menu for right-click actions.
